name: duo-bridge-poc
description: Builds constrained GitLab Duo prompts and safely applies reviewed JSON file-operation plans.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Duo Agent can modify workspace files only after the workspace is trusted.

virtualWorkspaces.description: Duo Agent requires a local Git checkout and the Git command-line client.

commands.title: Apply Pending JSON Response from Clipboard

duoAgent.requireCleanWorkingTree.description: Require a clean Git working tree before generating or applying a file-operation plan.

duoAgent.defaultAllowedPaths.description: Default repository-relative writable paths. The active file directory is proposed first when available.

duoAgent.maxContextFiles.description: Maximum number of complete files included in a generated master prompt.

duoAgent.maxContextCharacters.description: Maximum combined number of characters read from selected context files.

duoAgent.maxCharactersPerFile.description: Maximum characters included from any one context file or editor selection.

duoAgent.maxTreeEntries.description: Maximum number of tracked repository paths included in the master prompt.

duoAgent.maxFilePickerEntries.description: Maximum number of tracked files displayed in the context-file picker.

duoAgent.maxResponseBytes.description: Maximum UTF-8 size of a copied GitLab Duo JSON response.

duoAgent.maxFileWriteBytes.description: Maximum UTF-8 size of one created or replaced text file.

duoAgent.maxTotalWriteBytes.description: Maximum combined UTF-8 bytes written by one reviewed operation plan.

duoAgent.maxOperations.description: Maximum number of create, replace, or delete operations accepted in one response.

duoAgent.preserveExistingEol.description: Preserve the dominant line ending and UTF-8 BOM of replaced files.

duoAgent.clipboardWaitSeconds.description: How long the extension waits for the GitLab Duo JSON code block to be copied.
